entry.title: Seeking Support to Achieve My Dream: SAP HCM Associate Certificate
entry.content:
As an aspiring SAP HCM professional, I am on a journey to deepen my skills and knowledge in the world of SAP. Over the past year, I have transitioned from an SAP ABAP developer role into an SAP HCM consultant position. This shift has allowed me to explore the intricate workings of Human Capital Management and develop hands-on experience with SAP's comprehensive solutions.

In my current role, I have gained valuable experience in understanding the complexities of SAP HCM, such as personnel administration, organizational management, and time management. However, to further my professional growth and truly solidify my foundation, I am keen on earning the SAP HCM Associate Certification. Achieving this certification would not only validate my skills but also open new opportunities for career advancement and allow me to contribute more effectively to my organization.

Unfortunately, due to financial constraints, I am unable to afford the cost of the certification. I am reaching out to the SAP community and certification bodies to seek support for obtaining this valuable credential. I believe that with a certification, I can maximize my potential and continue contributing to SAP HCM projects with confidence and expertise.

Why Am I a Worthy Candidate?

  • Passion for SAP HCM: I am passionate about leveraging SAP technology to optimize HR processes and improve organizational efficiency. I consistently invest time in self-learning through available online resources, webinars, and hands-on practice.

  • Practical Experience: With my background as an SAP ABAP developer and my current role as an SAP HCM consultant, I have acquired a blend of technical and functional skills. This combination enables me to approach SAP HCM problems with a holistic perspective, bridging the gap between technical development and business requirements.

  • Commitment to Professional Growth: Despite financial challenges, I remain dedicated to advancing my career and skill set. The SAP HCM certification would serve as a catalyst for my professional development and would enable me to deliver better outcomes for clients and projects.

How Can SAP and the Community Support Me?

I am requesting assistance in the form of a scholarship or sponsorship to cover the certification cost. By investing in me, SAP or any supporting organization would not only be helping an individual achieve their goals but also contributing to the growth of the SAP community by enabling a committed professional to flourish.

Thank you for taking the time to read my story. I remain hopeful that I will find a way to achieve this certification and continue my journey as an SAP HCM consultant. Your support would be greatly appreciated, and I promise to pay it forward by helping others in similar situations once I am in a position to do so.

Sincerely,
Yeswanthraj Krishnan.

entry.title: Celebrating 2 Years of the Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Celebrating 2 Years of the Digital Skills Initiative

In less than two years, the Digital Skills Initiative has made a real impact on people’s lives, helping them gain certification and secure employment within the SAP ecosystem.

November 2024 marks 23 months since the Digital Skills Initiative first launched. Our mission from the outset has been simple: employ new people from underrepresented groups in the SAP ecosystem. Today, we’re proud to celebrate the success and hard work of all participants and partners involved.

The initiative has provided two main avenues for success: a self-study track and instructor-led boot camps. We’ve seen people from all walks of life, including those who may not have had the opportunity otherwise, excel in these programs and go on to achieve certification. Hundreds of participants have not only earned their certifications, but many have also secured jobs (or promotions) with SAP partners or SAP itself, launching promising careers.

Self-Study Success

One of the cornerstones of the initiative has been the self-study track. This flexible option has allowed participants to learn at their own pace, fitting their studies around existing commitments. Many applied and a determined and disciplined few achieved certification and career advancement as a result.

One shining example of a self-study success story is Lin Fan in Germany:

Breaking Barriers and Fighting Sexism: Lin’s Journey from a Salesgirl to an SAP Consultant

Lin has been incredibly supportive of the program following her success and has since started working at SAP. Her decision to start networking and self-studying toward her first certification served as a clear display of motivation for hiring managers.

Boot Camp Triumphs

Our instructor-led boot camps have been intensive, hands-on experiences designed to fast-track participants towards certification. These events provided not only technical training but also mentoring and networking opportunities, bridging the gap between education and employment.

Of course one of our shining bootcamp stars is Chelcie Scott, whose tenacity and persistence were unmatched – leading her to achieve SAP Certification and a start her career in the SAP Ecosystem with one of our partners:

Breaking Down Barriers: Hear from Chelcie Scott How She Broke into Tech with the Help of SAP

Changing Lives, One Certification at a Time

For some, earning an SAP certification has been a life-changing milestone, opening doors to new career opportunities, promotions and stable employment. The feedback from our participants has been overwhelmingly positive and while most of our success stories shall remain anonymous, I’d like to share a few more to drive the point home:

 Learning Her Way Up: The Inspiring Growth Story of Anu in Norway

Beating the Odds: How SAP Skills Shaped Luca’s Career Despite a Struggling Economy

Empowering Dreams Through Digital Skills: A Glimpse Into Karla's Tech Journey with SAP

Areeba's Journey to Learn SAP Skills: Shattering Glass Ceilings in Pakistan

Ashvini's Journey: Reimagining Success through SAP in a New Country

Shoutout to @Anne_Lenhardt  for communicating these stories for us!                                                                                                                                                                                          

The Digital Skills Initiative would not have been possible without the support of our dedicated instructors, SAP Partners, and most importantly, the determination of our participants. Together, we've created a community that supports learning and growth, fostering a more inclusive future within the SAP ecosystem.

As we approach our two-year anniversary, we eagerly look forward to seeing more individuals succeed and transform their lives through this initiative.

What newcomers to the SAP Ecosystem should do

For anyone interested in the self-study route of this initiative, please write to us here. Time is of the essence as we will be closing out the self-study program is now closed as of 4 November 2024. (Once you get your free certification exam attempt you will have 12 months to study for and take the exam.)

After November 4th:

If you are reading this after our self-study program has ended and you are still interested in getting started in the SAP ecosystem, here is what you can do:

  1. Get curious - start looking into what SAP is all about and choose a topic to start with. Check your local job market to see what skills are being sought too. Here are some aides for this process:
    • How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
    • Starting out developing skills in analytics? Not sure where to start?
    • SAP Finance enablement available on learning.sap.com
    • How to figure out if your certification / learning content is free of charge
    • How to use an AI Assistant or Large Language Model to help you learn SAP

  2. If you are not sure where to start studying, start here: Discovering End-to-End Business Processes for the Intelligent Enterprise
    • This course is perfect for beginners and generalists getting an overview on what SAP is all about
    • YOU CAN CERTIFY for this course. Take advantage of that.

  3. Purchase an SAP certification attempt:
    • Single Attempt
    • Student discounted attempt
    • How to schedule your exam

  4. Start networking. It is an absolute requirement for newcomers to put themselves out there and talk to people:
    •  A suggestion on how to approach networking and a career search in the SAP ecosystem.
    • Join the career corner

What partners and customers looking to hire talent should do

Send me a private message - we have some ideation to do and need your input!

Stay tuned for what’s next!

-David

entry.title: Showcase your security competence with our new SAP security operations certification
entry.content:
As companies transition their SAP landscapes to the cloud, strong security measures are essential to protect sensitive data and ensure system stability. To address this, we are introducing a new certification for partners who support SAP customers in managing security during cloud migration and ongoing cloud operations: SAP security operations certification.

Security is indispensable for companies migrating their SAP landscapes to the cloud. The importance of safeguarding sensitive data and maintaining system integrity cannot be overstated. As businesses migrate to the cloud, they seek guidance from their partners to implement robust security measures. 

Customers expect risk mitigation strategies, including attack surface reduction, identity and access management, and compliance controls. By offering these security measures, partners can ensure that their SAP customers confidently embrace cloud innovation, knowing their systems are resilient and protected. 

We are introducing a new certification for partners who help SAP customers manage their security during cloud migration and management of live SAP cloud solutions and landscapes. While SAP is responsible for the security of many layers of SAP cloud solutions, the certification covers additional areas and boundaries that are the customers’ responsibility.  The SAP security operations certification focuses on partners whose service portfolios include these security operations services for SAP’s cloud customers. 

To be qualified for this SAP security operations certification partners are audited for adherence to SAP’s security guidelines while offering security services for SAP cloud solutions and landscapes like identity & access management, SAP GRC, cybersecurity, attack surface reduction, enterprise threat detection, data privacy & protection, management of SAP application security, along with secure configuration, hyperscaler connectivity, and SAP development, to name a few. 

To ensure the new certification effectively covers the right topics and that auditors ask the most relevant questions, we conducted a pilot phase with two selected partners. The feedback was overwhelmingly positive, helping us fine-tune and enhance the certification offering. Even before launching, SAP partners expressed a clear demand for a certification that highlights their expertise in SAP security operations. With this in mind, we are confident that our new certification service will generate strong interest in the market.  

Partners who are SAP-certified in SAP security operations showcase their expertise, knowledge, and experience across a broad spectrum of security areas. This certification highlights their technical and process competencies, ensuring they can effectively manage and secure SAP cloud solutions for their customers. By choosing certified partners for security operations, customers not only protect themselves against potential cyber-attacks but also build trust with their stakeholders, demonstrating their commitment to maintaining the highest standards of data protection and privacy. 

Information on the certification program for operations partners and an overview of all certified partners can be found in the SAP Operations Partner Guide.

Visit OPC at SAP.com

entry.title: Haltet Euer SAP-Wissen frisch: Alles zu den Zertifizierungs-Updates
entry.content:
Rollenbasierte Zertifizierungen: Neuer Fokus auf Skills und Aufgaben

Eine der Änderungen im SAP-Zertifizierungsprogramm ist die Fokussierung auf rollenbasierte Zertifizierungen. Diese Zertifizierungen konzentrieren sich auf die spezifischen Fähigkeiten und Kernkompetenzen, die für bestimmte Rollen erforderlich sind, und geht damit weit über reine Produktkenntnisse hinaus. Unternehmen und Kunden können somit sicherstellen, dass sie mit Expert:innen zusammenarbeiten, deren Fähigkeiten genau den Anforderungen ihrer Rollen entsprechen. Zudem wurden einige Zertifizierungen retired, um das Angebot zu verschlanken.

Beispiele für rollenbasierte Zertifizierungen:

  1. SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Financial Accounting
    Diese Zertifizierung verbindet Kenntnisse zur Implementierung der SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition mit Expertise im Finanzwesen. Sie ist ideal für Berater:innen, die sich auf Finanzbuchhaltung spezialisiert haben.
  2. SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sourcing and Procurement
    Konzipiert für Expert:innen in Beschaffung und Sourcing, konzentriert sich diese Zertifizierung auf die Implementierung der SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Teilnehmende weisen mit der Prüfung Kenntnisse nach, mit denen die Effektivität in Beschaffungsprojekten gesteigert wird.
  3. SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sales
    Diese rollenspezifizierte Zertifizierung richtet sich an Vertriebsberater:innen und kombiniert detailliertes Implementierungswissen zur SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition mit den Schlüsselprozessen des Vertriebs. Sie ermöglicht den Teilnehmenden, ihre Expertise im Bereich Sales zu validieren.

 

„Stay Certified“: Immer auf dem Laufenden durch kontinuierliche Assessments

Ein weiteres Update betrifft die Gültigkeit der Zertifizierungen. Ab April 2024 müssen zertifizierte SAP-Expert:innen ihre Fähigkeiten regelmäßig durch sogenannte „Stay Certified“-Prüfungen aktualisieren. Diese Prüfungen ermöglichen die Verlängerung Eurer Zertifizierung um jeweils 12 Monate.

Jede Zertifizierung ist ab dem Zeitpunkt also 12 Monate gültig, und muss bis spätestens zum 31. März 2025 erneuert werden. Das kontinuierliche Nachweisen Eurer Kenntnisse stellt sicher, dass Ihr immer auf dem neuesten Stand der SAP-Innovationen seid. Damit erhöht sich auch Eure Wettbewerbsfähigkeit auf dem Arbeitsmarkt. Um das sichtbar machen zu können, gibt es digitale Badges sowohl für das Ablegen von Zertifizierungen als auch für das Abschließen von Learning Journeys (inklusive eines kurzen Selbsttests).

Mit einem Abonnement von SAP Learning Hub könnt Ihr Euch während des Gültigkeitszeitraums Eurer Zertifizierung jederzeit auf die „Stay Certified“-Prüfungen vorbereiten und diese auch ablegen. Der SAP Learning Hub bietet dazu eine Vielzahl an Ressourcen – von Inhalten für das Selbststudium über Schulungssysteme bis hin zu Live-Sessions mit SAP-Expert:innen, in denen Fragen direkt geklärt werden können.

 

Der erweiterte SAP Learning Hub: Ein umfassendes Lernangebot

Ein Abonnement für SAP Learning Hub umfasst den Zugriff auf alle Lernmaterialien der SAP sowie vier Prüfungsversuche für Zertifizierungen pro Jahr. Die Kosten für die initiale Zertifizierung und die „Stay Certified“-Assessments sind also in der SAP Learning Hub Subskription enthalten. Eine Zertifizierung bleibt 12 Monate gültig, solange Ihr die regelmäßigen Assessments besteht. Darüber hinaus erhaltet Ihr Zugang zu vorkonfigurierten Schulungssystemen, um Praxisübungen durchzuführen. Mit einem Abonnement für SAP Learning Hub seid Ihr also bestens aufgestellt: Ihr habt die Flexibilität, Eure Lernzeiten individuell zu gestalten, und könnt Euch auf Prüfungen vorbereiten sowie ablegen – ohne Mehrkosten.

Außerdem wurde das Angebot der Live-Sessions ausgebaut, in denen Ihr SAP-Expert:innen Fragen stellen könnt. Diese Kombination aus eigenständigem Lernen, praktischen Übungsmöglichkeiten in Testumgebungen und interaktiven Sessions stellt sicher, dass Ihr optimal auf Eure Zertifizierungen vorbereitet seid.

 

Vorbereitung auf die SAP-Zertifizierung: Eure Möglichkeiten

Neben SAP Learning Hub gibt es weiterhin die klassischen Lernmöglichkeiten und Schulungsformate, mit denen Ihr Euch auf Prüfungen vorbereiten könnt:

  • SAP-Schulung: Die klassischen Schulungskurse werden von erfahrenen Trainer:innen geleitet. Ihr könnt diese virtuell oder in einem der SAP-Schulungszentren besuchen.
  • SAP Blended Learning Academy: Dieses modulare Ausbildungsprogramm kombiniert Präsenzschulungen mit eigenständigem Lernen. Es endet mit einer SAP-Beraterzertifizierung und bietet somit eine umfassende und abwechslungsreiche Ausbildung.

 

Personalisierte Lernerfahrung und einfache Verwaltung

Eine wesentliche Neuerung im Umfeld der Zertifizierungen ist die Einführung der SAP Universal ID.Diese ID verknüpft Eure persönlichen Lern- und Zertifizierungsdaten und erleichtert die Verwaltung, insbesondere bei einem Arbeitgeberwechsel. Ihr könnt verschiedene S-User verlinken, sodass Ihr Euch keine Sorgen machen müsst, eine Zertifizierung bei einem Wechsel zu verlieren.

Darüber hinaus erinnert Euch das System rechtzeitig daran, Eure Zertifizierung zu aktualisieren und das 'Stay Certified'-Assessment rechtzeitig abzulegen. So stellt Ihr sicher, dass Euer Wissen immer auf dem neuesten Stand bleibt und Ihr keine wichtigen Updates verpasst.

 

Weiterführende Links

Weitere Informationen und Details zu dem Thema findet Ihr in der folgenden Link-Sammlung. Klickt Euch durch und haltet Euer SAP-Wissen auf dem neuesten Stand. Habt Ihr Fragen? Hinterlasst sie gerne in den Kommentaren!

SAP-Zertifizierung

  • SAP-Zertifizierung auf learning.sap.com: Dein zentraler Einstiegspunkt für SAP-Zertifizierungen.
  • Schulungen und Zertifizierung von SAP: Ein umfassender Überblick.
  • Aktuelle und bald ablaufende Zertifizierungen: Alle Details im Überblick.
  • FAQs zu SAP-Zertifizierungen: Häufig gestellte Fragen klar beantwortet.
  • Webinar zu SAP-Zertifizierungen: Verschaffe Dir einen detaillierten Einblick. 

SAP Learning Hub

  • Blogpost 'SAP Learning Hub 2024 Update FAQs': Die neuesten Informationen im Blogformat.
  • Überblick über SAP Learning Hub: Alles, was Du wissen musst.
  • Webinar zu SAP Learning Hub: Erfahre mehr in unserem jüngsten Webinar.

entry.title: Kickstart your Career: Become an SAP-Certified Solution Transformation Consultant
entry.content:
In a fast-paced world where companies rely on adaptation and transformation to have success, the role of the solution transformation consultant takes center stage. SAP Solution Transformation Consultants are responsible for guiding the entire business transformation journey, from initial design to final deployment, using a comprehensive end-to-end toolchain. They play a crucial role in accelerating transformation projects by leveraging best practices and ensuring high-quality business outcomes.

They navigate through digital landscapes and guide customers on a transformative journey from traditional ERP systems to the innovative SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Envision playing a central role in the RISE with SAP initiative, empowering enterprises to surge ahead in their market spaces. And with this brand-new role-based certification, we are helping you to achieve this goal.

Are you ready to shape the future of business transformation?

Check out our brand-new role-based certification SAP Certified Associate - Solution Transformation Consultant with SAP Cloud ALM. This certification validates that you possess the application lifecycle management skills and core knowledge in SAP Cloud ALM required for the consultant profile. By getting certified, you demonstrate that you have a comprehensive understanding, and the in-depth skills required to lead a project team as a solution transformation consultant, guiding the team through the solution transformation journey using SAP Cloud ALM. 

Start with this free learning journey

To get started, take the new free, self-paced learning journey "Transforming for Success: Solution Transformation with SAP Cloud ALM" on the SAP Learning site.  In just 16 hours – divided into six sections– you will learn how SAP Cloud ALM, as part of SAP's transformation approach, supports the entire solution transformation journey—from business and solution transformation methodology to agile implementation and efficient operations. After completing this learning journey, you will have the skills to leverage SAP Cloud ALM for comprehensive solution transformation and have an overview of SAP's business transformation strategy.

If you want to learn more about how SAP can help you accelerate digital transformation, check out the story of Martina Ohlerth and benefit from her first-hand experience!

Certified learners need to continuously keep their skills up-to-date and certifications valid by completing mandatory assessments before their certification expires. With an SAP Learning Hub subscription, you can prepare for and take the stay certified assessments at any time during the validity period of your certification.  If you want to know more on how to get and stay certified, you can read this blog post.

Open new professional opportunities for you with new learning and a sought-after certification. Build the skills you need on the SAP Learning site and get inspired by reading learner stories on SAP Community, ask questions and connect with fellow learners. When you’re ready, take your certification exam and start shaping your industry's future!

entry.title: Education, Determination, and Tech: How Pegah Integrated and Succeeded
entry.content:
“My way to set foot in Germany was through education – that's how I integrated.” When speaking about her journey from a refugee to a woman in tech @ SAP – that’s how Pegah Eghbali Alamdari titled one of her speaking engagements – you would have never guessed that she struggled with public speaking. “This fear was always there, like a shadow.” But today feels different for the 33-year-old, who always dreamt of working at SAP. 

Pegah and her sister were born in Iran, but her parents early on decided that their girls shouldn’t grow up in their home country. When the family fled, Pegah was merely seven years old. “My father went ahead, he wanted to get us to Germany quickly, but that didn't work out right away, so Pegah, her sister, and their mother made a two-month journey to Germany”, she explains. And when they were finally reunited, life looked very different suddenly: “new culture, new language, new people”, Pegah says. 

SAP was the big goal

But one thing she recognized, felt comfortable with, was math. “As a universal language, math was one of the few things I knew from my previous life and understood without needing to speak the language. That’s what I knew and how I could show what I was capable of. Thanks to my achievements in math, I was able to belong.” She graduated with success and went on to study medical informatics. “And when I studied, the big goal was SAP.”  

Pegah and her sister were born in Iran, but her parents early on decided that their girls shouldn’t grow up in their home country.Four years ago, she was hired and now works as a Senior Technology Consultant in Cybersecurity and Compliance. “Our team ensures that our customers' S4HANA systems are secure and compliant”, she explains, adding that her expertise is in authorizations. “I help customers by developing secure authorization concepts for their S4HANA systems. I am rarely on-site with customers, which allows me to work very flexibly and support multiple projects at the same time.” 

"You have to face your fears"

But besides projects at work, there’s also other projects close to her heart: As a volunteer, Pegah taught math in Zanzibar (Tansania), passing on what was her path to success: education. “I want to show everyone that you can be successful and that you can do it, if you want it.” According to her, hard work and passion are essential to make dreams come true. “You have to face your fears, put the goal above everything else”, she advises. Adding: “And you must be prepared to learn something new.” 

Pegah shares, "I feel like life moves really quickly. To not fall behind tomorrow, it's important to realize that life itself is a school. If we stop learning, we'll eventually just stay in one place. I know I love learning, so I want to absorb as much as I can to move forward with the best." Learning about secure authorization concepts for SAP systems has allowed her to be more efficient and provide valuable support to her customers. Pegah reflects on her journey, saying, "I have received an important voice which means to have the power to make a difference". 

Started a non-profit organization

In addition to professional growth, the knowledge she has gained empowered her to give back to the community. Pegah has started with her sister and two other SAP colleagues (Cigdem Guendogdu and Dilara Yarar) a non-profit organization names “BLESSMANITY Germany e.V.” that focuses on improving access to education for children in developing countries. Currently they are building a canteen at a kindergarten in Zanzibar to ensure that the children receive a nutritious meal once a day. The skills she has mastered have given her the confidence and capability to make a difference in the lives of those in need.  

For Pegah, learning new skills has been life-changing, giving her a sense of purpose and the power to create a positive impact. Pegah shares, "I want to inspire people and be a role model, showing that integration and success are possible through education, determination, discipline, and courage. Anything is possible in life. I am very grateful for everything I have received in life and see it as my duty to give back." 

Learning offers life-changing potential

Her personal story is a testament to the countless benefits of learning and growing. Whether it's professional growth, work-life balance, or the ability to make a difference, the advantages are significant and impactful. 

If you’re considering learning and growing, Pegah’s story is a compelling reminder of the life-changing potential it holds. Whether it’s for professional advancement or personal fulfilment, learning SAP skills could also be the right path for you. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on the SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career.

entry.title: What you need to get and stay certified
entry.content:
Please ask a question in the Q&A area
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.


There’s no doubt about the tangible and compelling benefits of an IT certification. According to the “2023 Value of IT Certification Candidate Report” by Pearson VUE, 79% of certified individuals received or anticipated a salary increase after getting certified. 81% of them produced a higher quality of work – besides the fact that 92% felt more confident in their abilities. So, getting certified makes sense.  

But how do you get certified in the first place? And more importantly: How do you stay certified? You’ll find out in this blog post! 

Let’s start with the basics: A new certification program and offering 

The demand for skilled IT professionals is expected to grow dramatically – up 23% by 2031 in the United States alone, according to the U.S. Department of Labor. This pace of change and the talent shortage call for a new approach to identifying future-focused skills and the necessity of staying up to date. To help meet these new circumstances, SAP enhanced its certification program in the beginning of 2024 with the launch of the enhanced SAP Learning Hub.

One subscription for all certification resources 

The great thing about the enhanced SAP Learning Hub is that you can both get and stay certified with one single subscription to the premium, guided learning offering. Once subscribed, you get access to future-focused learning content, expert guidance in live sessions, on-demand access to hands-on practice systems, and enhanced analytics.  

When you’re ready to get certified, you don’t need to worry about buying certification attempts like in the past: Four attempts per year are already included and once successfully passed, your SAP Certification is valid for 12 months! You can then continuously expand the validity of your certification by passing the yearly assessments to stay certified. 

Can I still buy single certification attempts? 

Don’t worry – if you wanted to buy one or six SAP Certification attempts like in the past – you still can. But there are some things you should consider: You can still complete all your learning, successfully pass the exam, and demonstrate your expertise with your badge for 12 months.  

However, after one year, you will need to re-certify – leaving you with two options: 1. Subscribing to the enhanced SAP Learning Hub, where stay certified assessments are included or 2. buying a new SAP Certification exam attempt. But that would mean you had to retake the full certification exam as well.  

What’s the difference between the SAP Certification exam and the stay certified assessment? 

Great that you ask – because the difference is big! As said, as a subscriber to SAP Learning Hub, your annual stay certified assessments are included in your subscription. But in contrast to classic SAP Certification exams, stay certified assessments are short, not proctored quizzes with unlimited trials. They test only the knowledge between releases to make sure learners stay continuously up to date with the solution updates. Plus: To prepare for your assessment, you have access to dedicated learning materials, like live sessions.  

The rules for an SAP Certification exam are different: The exams are proctored and can typically take up to three hours. Candidates are required to answer 40-80 questions, out of which 60-70% correctly to pass the exam. If candidates fail the exam, they need to repurchase an SAP Certification exam attempt and retake the exam. 

So, what’s the recommendation here? 

Of course, this totally depends on your role and personal learning preferences. However, we do see the benefits of opting for the SAP Learning Hub subscription. With one single subscription, you can get access to all resources you need to prepare for certification, take the exams with four included attempts and stay certified – at better value than ever before.  

To learn more about the ways to get and stay certified, visit this FAQ and let us know in the comments about the benefits you had thanks to SAP Certifications!

entry.title: Empowering Your SAP Journey: Insights from SAP Champions and Mentors
entry.content:
As tech professionals, we understand the importance of staying ahead in the constantly evolving tech industry. Thanks to the cloud, SAP is innovating every day – and we need (and want to) keep up with the speed. That’s not only true for newcomers in the field, but also for well-versed professionals like SAP Mentors and SAP Champions. Listen to the top influencers, contributors, and advocates within the SAP ecosystem and learn why you should invest in continuous learning, SAP skills, and certification now, with this new video series: 

The first video, "Stay Ahead with Certifications and Continuous Learning," features SAP Mentors emphasizing the importance of continuous learning and certifications in keeping up with the fast-paced tech industry. They share their own experiences and insights on how SAP Certifications have helped them stay ahead in their careers.

"Empowering Your Digital Transformation with SAP" delves into the topic of digital transformation and how SAP is at the forefront of enabling companies to prepare for and embrace this transformation. The SAP Mentors share their insights on the importance of aligning with SAP's digital transformation strategy and how it can drive success for businesses in today's digital age.

In the next video, "Leveraging AI Resources to Drive Innovation and Efficiency," SAP Mentors discuss the role of AI in driving innovation and increasing efficiency within the SAP ecosystem, providing valuable advice on leveraging these resources effectively.  

To wrap up, "Unlocking Potential with SAP Learning Hub" focuses on the power of SAP Learning Hub in providing valuable resources and training for tech professionals. The Mentors share their thoughts on how SAP Learning Hub has played a crucial role in their professional development and how it can benefit others in the SAP community.  

In the words of our SAP Mentors: 

“SAP Certifications have never been easier to get. Now you simply just go to learning.sap.com and you can access all of the learning content.“ 
– @DanielleLarocca, SAP Partner, Strategic Alliances, EPI-USE Labs 

“One of the most important things to our customers and partners is to keep up with all this latest innovation. That is why it’s so important to take a look at the new learning journey around the SAP Business AI portfolio.“ 
– @DiegoDora, SAP Partner, Founder, CEO and Chief Architect at Diff Consulting 

Start your own success story today and head over to SAP Learning site now!

entry.title: Essential Resources for SAP Fiori Development
entry.content:
Essential Resources for SAP Fiori Development

Hello everyone, as an SAP Fiori developer, I like to stay informed of the latest features, be technically at ease, follow development and user interface best practices, or find help when I get stuck on a problem. I'm sharing below a list of resources and websites I use daily to help me master SAP Fiori development and stay up to date (feel free to add to it in the comments with your recommendations 😉 ).

SAP Official Resources

No journey into SAP Fiori development is complete without exploring the wealth of official resources SAP provides. These resources ensure you get accurate, up-to-date information on the platform’s tools, techniques, and methodologies.

SAP Fiori Design Guidelines

This official guide covers SAP Fiori UX principles, including visual design, interaction patterns, and branding guidelines. It's crucial for developers to understand the Fiori design philosophy and ensure that the apps they develop align with SAP’s standards. These guidelines are updated regularly, reflecting evolving best practices and new SAP Fiori features.

SAP Developer Center

A central hub for all things related to SAP development. It hosts a variety of tutorials, blogs, sample projects, and developer tools with examples for novice, intermediate, and advanced developers.

SAPUI5 SDK

The documentation of SAPUI5, the framework behind SAP Fiori apps. It provides detailed API documentation, code samples, and interactive tutorials to help developers understand and use SAPUI5 effectively. The SDK also includes best practices, demo applications...

SAP Community

As one of the largest communities of SAP professionals, it is filled with interactive content including developer blogs and insights, forums for troubleshooting and peer support, SAP Fiori-focused events and webinars… You can search the community to find solutions to common development problems, get advice on the latest trends, and engage with other developers who share their experiences and knowledge.

For those looking for fun and community-driven engagement, SAP Developer Challenges are a great way to test your skills while competing with fellow developers. 

SAP Help Portal

The official documentation for all SAP products, including SAP Fiori. Whether you're working on an implementation, configuring an app, or troubleshooting issues, the Help Portal has comprehensive guidelines, API documentation, and step-by-step instructions. 

SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library

This library catalogs all standard  Fiori apps, offering detailed descriptions, implementation prerequisites, and links to relevant documentation. You can also find UI5 versions and determine which apps are customizable or extensible to meet your specific needs.

Online Learning Platforms

As Fiori development is a specialized field, self-paced learning platforms can provide structured paths to accelerate your expertise. Here are some of the best online resources for learning SAP Fiori and SAPUI5:

SAP Learning Hub

For more comprehensive learning and certification preparation, it is an excellent platform that provides access to vast training content. Whether you’re a beginner or a seasoned developer, the platform offers structured learning journeys tailored to specific roles and technologies. In addition to courses, you get access to workshops, certification preparation materials, and practice exams.

SAP Certification Hub

Earning an official SAP certification is a great way to demonstrate your proficiency as a developer. As a Fiori developer, you can't miss out on SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP Fiori Application Developer certification (which I'm preparing right now 😁) By achieving certification, you prove your expertise and increase your marketability in the SAP ecosystem.

Other Fun Communities and Learning Resources

Here are some more fun and interactive resources for your learning journey:

  • Stack Overflow - SAP Fiori: Find answers to specific development challenges related to SAP Fiori, with detailed discussions on common issues, troubleshooting tips, and optimization strategies.
  • Reddit - r/SAP: Informal discussions, news, and updates on SAP technologies, including Fiori development.
  • SAP Fiori YouTube Channels: Explore YouTube channels like DJ Adams one to see live coding sessions, tips, and tricks for working with SAP Fiori, UI5, and SAP Cloud Platform. His videos are an excellent way to stay updated with the latest SAP trends, and they provide practical demonstrations of development techniques.

Conclusion

I hope this short list will help you find ways to improve your SAP Fiori skills and answer any questions you may have. Don't hesitate to share your resources, tips and experiences with the community in the comments, and above all... stay curious! 👀🚀

entry.title: Aveniq überzeugt als Pilotpartner für neue Zertifizierung 'SAP security operations'
entry.content:
Wir schätzen die langjährige Partnerschaft mit Aveniq, einer seit über zehn Jahren verlässlichen SAP-zertifizierten Partnerin, die inzwischen Zertifizierungen für vier ihrer Services vorweisen kann. In unseren Gesprächen hob Aveniq hervor, dass der Fokus in den kommenden Jahren verstärkt auf dem Thema Sicherheit liegen wird. Umso mehr freuen wir uns, Aveniq als Pilotpartnerin für die Einführung unserer neuen Zertifizierung SAP security operations gewonnen zu haben.

Vor der Einführung einer neuen Zertifizierung wählt SAP gezielt Partner aus, die den Zertifizierungsprozess in einer Pilotphase durchlaufen. So stellt SAP sicher, dass der Ablauf reibungslos funktioniert und der Inhalt optimal auf den jeweiligen Themenbereich abgestimmt ist. Mit ihrer umfassenden Expertise im Bereich SAP Security erwies sich Aveniq als optimale Partnerin für die Pilotierung der neuen Zertifizierung SAP security operations.

In folgendem Interview mit Aveniq erfahren wir, welche Services das Unternehmen im Bereich SAP Security für SAP Cloud Kunden anbietet. Zudem führen sie aus, warum sie Security als strategisches Schwerpunktthema für sich definiert haben und welche Bedeutung dieses Thema auch für ihre Kunden hat. Zudem beleuchten sie, warum sich Aveniq dazu entschieden hat, als Pilotpartnerin für die neue Zertifizierung SAP Security Operations mitzuwirken, und welche Vorteile sie sich von dieser Zertifizierung versprechen.

 

Vielleicht möchten Sie uns zunächst etwas über Ihr Unternehmen erzählen und welche Dienstleistungen Aveniq im Bereich Security für SAP Cloud Kunden anbietet?

Aveniq ist eine führende Schweizer IT-Dienstleisterin und primär in den Branchen Finanzdienstleister, Gesundheitswesen, Industrie, Versorger, öffentlicher Sektor und Bildungswesen tätig. Aveniq bietet ihren Kunden innovative Dienstleistungen für den modernen Arbeitsplatz, Hybrid/Cloud-Lösungen, SAP-Beratung und -Implementierung, Hyperautomation-Möglichkeiten, Digitalisierungslösungen sowie CAD/PLM-Lösungen und Beratungsdienstleistungen mit Schwerpunkt IT-Infrastruktur, IT-Security und Business Continuity. An den Standorten Baden, Bern, Dübendorf und Oftringen sind rund 650 Mitarbeitende tätig.

Aveniq bietet SAP Cloud Kunden eine Vielzahl von Dienstleistungen im Bereich Security. Dazu gehört das Identity & Access Management, das die Verwaltung von Benutzer*innen, Rollen, Katalogen, Single Sign-On (SSO), Provisionierung, Zugriffskontrolle sowie Identitäts- und Zugriffs-Governance umfasst. Ebenso bietet Aveniq die Überprüfung und Überwachung von SAP-Systemen im Rahmen von SAP Security Checks und Monitoring. Auch die Sicherheit des SAP Cloud Connectors wird durch gezielte Maßnahmen gewährleistet.
Darüber hinaus unterstützt Aveniq bei internen und externen Audits, indem sie bei der Vorbereitung und Durchführung von Sicherheitsprüfungen hilft. Schulungen und Sensibilisierungsmaßnahmen zu sicherheitsrelevanten Themen fördern die ‚Security Awareness‘. Die Analyse von Sicherheitslücken im Code von SAP-Anwendungen gehört ebenfalls zum Leistungsportfolio, ebenso wie Maßnahmen zur Verringerung der Angriffsfläche auf Applikations- und Systemebene.
Weitere Leistungen umfassen Datenschutz und Datensicherheit, mit einem Fokus auf den Schutz der Privatsphäre und der Integrität der Daten. Sicherheitsbefunde aus dem EarlyWatch Alert (EWA) werden durch gezielte Behebung adressiert. Zusätzlich bietet Aveniq Beratungsdienstleistungen an, um Kunden bei der Implementierung und Optimierung von SAP-Sicherheitsstrategien zu unterstützen – von der Analyse der Sicherheitsanforderungen über die Entwicklung von Sicherheitskonzepten bis hin zur Begleitung bei der Umsetzung.

 

Was war ausschlaggebend für Aveniq, Security als Fokus-Thema zu setzen? Und warum ist das Thema so bedeutsam für Aveniq und ihre Kunden? 

Die Bedeutung der Informationssicherheit für den langfristigen Erfolg und für die Nachhaltigkeit in einer sich ständig verändernden, digitalen und vernetzten Geschäftswelt, ist massiv gestiegen. Angesichts der zunehmenden Cyber-Angriffe ist eine proaktive, strategische Herangehensweise an Informationssicherheit und Datenschutz unerlässlich. Aveniq hat eine durchgängige Security-Strategie entwickelt, die sich am Marktbedarf und an modernen Prinzipien orientiert und sowohl physische als auch digitale Sicherheit, Management-Sicherheit und betriebliche Sicherheit umfasst.

Das Thema Security ist besonders bedeutsam, weil es zentrale Vorteile bietet:

  • Ganzheitlicher Ansatz: Aveniq legt grossen Wert darauf, keine Unterscheidung zwischen IT und OT zu machen und einen umfassenden Ansatz zu verfolgen, der Security, Privacy und Protection gemäss dem Prinzip «Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability» nach NIST CSF 2.0 und ZeroTrust über alle Ebenen hinweg implementiert. Dies umfasst Systeme, Prozesse, Produkte, Informationen/Daten, Personen und Lieferanten, also den Schutz der Unternehmenswerte.
  • Verbesserte Sicherheit: Durch umfassende, präventive Sicherheitsmassnahmen wird ein hoher Schutz gewährleistet, der alle Angriffsvektoren abdeckt. Dies wird durch kontinuierliches Monitoring und schnelle Reaktionsmassnahmen (Response, Recover) unterstützt, die mit unserem Security Operations Center (SOC) sichergestellt sind.
  • Vertrauensbildung: Die Einhaltung internationaler Sicherheitsstandards und Datenschutzprinzipien, belegt durch verschiedene Zertifizierungen wie ISO 27001, ISO 22301 und weitere, stärkt das Vertrauen.
  • Anpassungsfähigkeit: Flexibilität und Kontrolle im hybriden und Multi-Cloud-Modell ermöglichen es, spezifische Kundenbedürfnisse effizient zu erfüllen.
  • Effizienzsteigerung: Die Konsolidierung von Technologien und Prozessen führt zu einer verbesserten Infrastruktur- und Anwendungsverwaltung und optimierten Kosten für die Kunden.
  • Kundenzentrierte Lösungen: Modular aufgebaute und replizierbare Services sind auf die individuellen Anforderungen und Geschäftsziele der Kunden abgestimmt und berücksichtigen dabei auch gesetzliche Anforderungen und Risikobereitschaft.

Diese Security-Fokussierung trägt zur Stärkung der Wettbewerbsposition der Kunden bei und ermöglicht es Aveniq, ihre Marktposition weiter auszubauen.

 

Warum hat sich Aveniq dafür entschieden, Pilotpartnerin für die neue Zertifizierung SAP security operations zu werden?
Aveniq hat sich seit der erstmaligen Zertifizierung als SAP Operations Partner im Jahr 2011 kontinuierlich weiterentwickelt und sich agil an die sich wandelnden Kundenbedürfnisse sowie an die strategische Ausrichtung von SAP angepasst. Mit einem breiten Spektrum an Dienstleistungen - von SAP HANA Operations-Services über verschiedene Betriebsmodelle wie RISE with SAP Services, über SAP Remote-Support bis zu SAP Hosting in der Aveniq Cloud sowie über Hyperscaler - durften wir uns mit unseren rund 100 internen SAP-Spezialist*innen im Schweizer Markt etablieren.

Als einer der ersten Partner der Schweiz stellten wir 2018 unsere Kompetenzen für SAP S/4HANA Solutions Operations mit einer Zertifizierung unter Beweis. Unsere Zertifizierung für SAP BTP operations im Jahr 2024 verdeutlicht die fortlaufende Innovation und unser Engagement, den Kunden fortschrittliche und sichere SAP-Lösungen zu bieten. Das umfassende Wissen im Bereich SAP Security ermöglicht es uns, auch einen entscheidenden Beitrag zur Sicherheit und Effizienz der SAP-Systeme unserer Kunden zu leisten. Daher war die Zertifizierung für SAP Security Operations der nächste logische Schritt, um unser Expertenwissen auch in diesem Bereich auf den Prüfstand zu stellen.
Dass SAP uns als Pilotpartnerin für die neue Zertifizierung ausgewählt hat, erfüllt uns mit Stolz und Dankbarkeit. Das gemeinsame Streben nach Exzellenz ist der Grundstein unserer langjährigen Partnerschaft auf Augenhöhe. Wir freuen uns sehr, dass die Qualität unserer Dienstleistung im Bereich SAP Security die Auditoren überzeugt hat.

 

Welchen Nutzen versprechen Sie sich von einer SAP-Zertifizierung im Bereich Security Operations für SAP-Cloud-Lösungen?

Wir sehen in einer SAP-Zertifizierung im Bereich Security Operations für SAP-Cloud-Lösungen mehrere Vorteile.

Die Zertifizierung stärkt das Vertrauen der Kunden in die Sicherheitskompetenz von Aveniq und unterstreicht die Glaubwürdigkeit des Unternehmens als vertrauenswürdige Partnerin für SAP-Sicherheitslösungen. Zudem stellt sie sicher, dass die Sicherheitsoperationen von Aveniq den höchsten Standards entsprechen und kontinuierlich verbessert werden. Damit kann Aveniq ihren Kunden einen höheren Schutz und eine bessere Servicequalität bieten, was zu einer höheren Kundenzufriedenheit führt. 

Zusammenfassend lässt sich sagen, dass eine SAP-Zertifizierung nicht nur das Vertrauen und die Glaubwürdigkeit eines Unternehmens stärkt, sondern auch zur Optimierung von Prozessen und zur Erschliessung neuer Märkte beiträgt. Sie bietet einen klaren Nachweis für die Einhaltung von Standards und Qualitätsanforderungen; was sowohl für bestehende, als auch für potenzielle Kunden sowie auch für den Hersteller selbst von grossem Wert ist.

 

 

Informationen zum Zertifizierungsprogramm für Operations Partner und eine Übersicht über alle zertifizierten Partner finden Sie auf unserem SAP Operations Partner Guide.

entry.title: Aveniq convinces as pilot partner for new certification: SAP security operations
entry.content:
We appreciate the long-standing partnership with Aveniq, a trusted SAP-certified operations partner for more than ten years, with now four SAP-certified services. In discussions with Aveniq, they shared that security will be their key focus in the coming years. We were therefore delighted to have them as a pilot partner for the launch of our new security operations certification.

Before introducing a new certification, SAP selects partners to go through the certification process as pilots to ensure that the process runs smoothly and is optimally tailored to the subject area. With its extensive SAP security knowledge, Aveniq was ideally suited to be a pilot partner for the SAP security operations certification.

In an interview with Aveniq, we learn which services they offer in the area of SAP security for SAP Cloud customers. They also explain why they have defined security as a strategic focus area for themselves and the importance of this topic for their customers. They also outline why Aveniq decided to participate as a pilot partner for the new SAP Security Operations certification and what benefits they expect to gain from this certification.

 

May you want to start by telling us about your company and what services Aveniq is offering for SAP security to cloud customers?

Aveniq is a leading Swiss IT service provider with around 650 employees and is primarily active in the financial services, healthcare, industrial, utilities, public sector, and education sectors. Aveniq offers its customers innovative services for a modern workplace, hybrid/cloud solutions, SAP consulting and implementation, hyper-automation options, digitalization solutions as well as CAD/PLM solutions, and consulting services with a focus on IT infrastructure, IT security, and business continuity.

Aveniq offers SAP Cloud customers a wide range of security services:

The services encompass a wide range of security-focused solutions, including the management of identity and access, covering users, roles, catalogs, single sign-on (SSO), provisioning, access control, and identity and access governance. They also involve checking and monitoring the security of SAP systems, ensuring the security of the SAP Cloud Connector, and supporting both internal and external audits through preparation and implementation. Furthermore, the offerings include training and raising awareness about security topics, analyzing code vulnerabilities in SAP applications, and implementing measures to reduce the attack surface at both the application and system levels.

The services also involve data protection and security, ensuring privacy and maintaining data integrity. They also address the remediation of security findings identified through the Early Watch Alert (EWA). Additionally, consulting services are offered to support the implementation and optimization of SAP security strategies, encompassing the analysis of security requirements, the development of tailored security concepts, and assistance throughout the implementation process.

 

What was the deciding factor for Aveniq to focus on security? And why is the topic so important for Aveniq and its customers? 

The importance of information security for long-term success and sustainability in a constantly changing, digital, and interconnected business world has increased massively. In the face of increasing cyber-attacks, a proactive, strategic approach to information security and data protection is essential. Aveniq has developed an end-to-end security strategy based on market needs and modern principles, encompassing both physical and digital security, management security, and operational security.

The topic of security is particularly important for several reasons:

Holistic approach: Aveniq emphasizes the importance of making no distinction between IT and OT, and taking a comprehensive approach that implements security, privacy, and protection across all levels according to the principle of “Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability” as per NIST CSF 2.0 and ZeroTrust. This includes systems, processes, products, information/data, people, and suppliers, i.e. the protection of company assets.

Improved security: Comprehensive, preventive security measures ensure a high level of protection that covers all attack vectors. This is supported by continuous monitoring and rapid response measures (response, recovery), which are ensured by our Security Operations Center (SOC).

Building trust: Compliance with international security standards and data protection principles, evidenced by various certifications such as ISO 27001, ISO 22301, and others, strengthens trust.

Adaptability: Flexibility and control in the hybrid and multi-cloud model enable specific customer needs to be met efficiently.

Increased efficiency: Consolidation of technologies and processes leads to improved infrastructure and application management and optimized costs for customers.

Customer-centric solutions: Modular and replicable services are designed to meet customers' individual requirements and business objectives, considering regulatory requirements and risk appetite.

This security orientation helps to strengthen the competitive position of customers and enables Aveniq to further expand its market position.

 

What factors influenced Aveniq's decision to support SAP as a pilot partner in the validation of the new certification 'SAP security operations'?

Since its initial certification as an SAP operations partner in 2011, Aveniq has continued to develop and adapt to changing customer needs and SAP's strategic direction. With a broad range of services - from SAP HANA operations services and various operating models such as RISE with SAP services to SAP remote support and SAP hosting in the Aveniq Cloud and via hyperscalers - we have been able to establish ourselves in the Swiss market with around 100 internal SAP specialists.

In 2018, we were one of the first partners in Switzerland to demonstrate our expertise in SAP S/4HANA solutions operations with a certification. Our certification for SAP BTP operations in 2024 illustrates our ongoing innovation and commitment to providing customers with advanced and secure SAP solutions. Our comprehensive knowledge of SAP security enables us to make a decisive contribution to the security and efficiency of our customers' SAP systems. Certification for SAP security operations was therefore the next logical step to put our expertise in this area to the test.

The fact that SAP has chosen us as a pilot partner for the new certification fills us with pride and gratitude. The joint pursuit of excellence is the cornerstone of our long-standing partnership as equals. We are delighted that the auditors were impressed by the quality of our SAP security services.

 

What benefits do you anticipate from being SAP-certified in SAP security operations for SAP cloud solutions?

We see several advantages in SAP certification for SAP security operations for SAP cloud solutions. 

The certification strengthens the customers’ confidence in Aveniq's security expertise and underlines the company's credibility as a trusted partner for SAP security solutions. It ensures that Aveniq's SAP security operation services meet the highest standards and are continuously improved. This allows Aveniq to provide its customers with a higher level of protection and improved service quality, leading to increased customer satisfaction. Furthermore, the certification strengthens the long-standing partnership between SAP and Aveniq, fostering mutual benefits for both parties.

In summary, SAP certification not only strengthens a company's trust and credibility but also helps to optimize internal processes and open up new markets. It provides clear proof of compliance with standards and quality requirements, which is of great value to existing and potential customers as well as to the manufacturer itself.

 

 

 

Information on the certification program for operations partners and an overview of all certified partners can be found in the SAP Operations Partner Guide.

Visit OPC at SAP.com

entry.title: Die beliebtesten SAP Schulungen 2024: Klassenraumschulungen, Live Sessions und mehr
entry.content:
SAP bietet eine Vielzahl von Schulungsformaten, um den unterschiedlichen Bedürfnissen von Lernenden gerecht zu werden. Hier sind die beliebtesten SAP-Schulungen im Jahr 2024. Ich möchte damit eine Orientierung geben – vielleicht ist ja eine Anregung für den einen oder die andere dabei.

 

SAP Schulungen im Klassenraum

Präsenzschulungen in SAP-Trainingszentren wie im schönen Walldorf ermöglichen direkten Kontakt zu erfahrenen Trainern. Die praxisorientierten Kurse fördern Austausch, den Praxistransfer mit Schulungssystemen und die Klärung von Fragen. Viele schätzen immer noch das geführte Lernen. Anbei die beliebtesten SAP Kurse 2024 – eine komplette Übersicht gibt es hier im SAP Schulungskatalog.

 

Kurskürzel

Kursname

Link

ADM100

System Administration for SAP S/4HANA

Link

ADM940

SAP S/4HANA Cloud - System Administration

Link

ADM945

SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Security Administration

Link

ADMCLD

SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Data Lifecycle Management

Link

BC400

ABAP Programming for SAP S/4HANA 
FYI: BC* wurden durch S4D* Kurse ersetzt - mehr Infos hier

 

BC401

ABAP Development for SAP HANA 
FYI: BC* wurden durch S4D* Kurse ersetzt - mehr Infos hier

 

BW410

SAP BW/4HANA - Data Warehousing

Link

CLD900

SAP Cloud Platform - Introduction

Link

EWM100

Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) - Basics

Link

EWM110

Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) - Advanced Topics

Link

HA200

SAP HANA 2.0 - Installation and Administration

Link

HR050

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Essentials

Link

HR305

SAP SuccessFactors Performance and Goals Management

Link

HR400

SAP SuccessFactors Learning Management

Link

S4500

SAP S/4HANA - Financial Accounting

Link

S4520

SAP S/4HANA - Management Accounting

Link

S4550

SAP S/4HANA - Sales and Distribution

Link

S4605

SAP S/4HANA - Procurement

Link

S4D400

SAP S/4HANA - Customizing for Financial Accounting

Link

S4D430

SAP S/4HANA - Customizing for Sales and Distribution

Link

 

Live Sessions in SAP Learning Hub

Der SAP Learning Hub bietet interaktive Live-Sessions, die von SAP-Expert:innen geleitet werden. Mit über 4.200 Sessions in verschiedenen Sprachen können Teilnehmende flexibel lernen und sich auf spezifische Themen konzentrieren. Dabei gibt es unterschiedliche Typen von Live-Sessions: Expert Deep Dive, Get Started zur Einführung, Stay Certified, structured Guided Learning mit spez. Bootcamp Angeboten, sowie What’s New. Hier ist die Übersicht über alle Live Sessions – anbei die beliebtesten im Jahr 2024.

  • Getting Started with ABAP Cloud Development
  • In-Depth with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
  • Extending SAP S/4HANA Apps with Key-User Extensibility
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series - Artificial Intelligence & Technologies
  • AI & Intelligent Technology - Product Expert Training HY2 2024
  • Getting Started with SAP Build Apps
  • Getting Started with Development Using SAP BTP ABAP Environment
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 - Early Release Series Artificial Intelligence & Technologies
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 - Early Release Series Extensibility
  • Modernizing Custom ABAP Code
  • SAP S/4HANA - Master Data, Migration Cockpit & Test Data Refresh - Product Expert Training HY2 2024
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 - SAP Activate, SAP Cloud ALM, and Test Automation Tool
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 Early Release Series - SAP User Experience
  • SAP Signavio Process Navigator - Product Expert Training HY2 2024
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 - SAP Activate, SAP Cloud ALM, and Test Automation Tool
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 Early Release Series - Finance
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 Early Release Series - Sales
  • Executive Introduction & Product Strategy Update – Product Expert Training HY2 2024
  • Partner Bootcamp - Migrating SAP HANA on-premise to SAP HANA Cloud
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series - Finance

Hier fehlen dem einen oder anderen sicher beliebte Themen. Das lag u.a. daran, dass sich nach einigen sehr oft gebuchten Top Sessions die Buchungen relativ gleich verteilen... sprich bekannte Themen wie aus dem SuccessFactors Bereich sind nur ein paar Buchungen hinten dran.... 
Wichtig zu wissen: zum Nutzen dieser Session benötigt man eine Subscription des SAP Learning Hub. 


Schulungssysteme in SAP Learning Hub

In SAP Learning Hub haben Nutzende auch Zugang zu vorkonfigurierten Trainingssystemen inkl. Übungen, um das Gelernte direkt anzuwenden. Diese vorkonfigurierten Systeme bieten eine sichere Umgebung für das Ausprobieren von SAP-Lösungen und dem Aufbau von Kompetenzen. Hier eine Liste der beliebtesten Schulungssysteme 2024. Per se sind dies natürlich keine Schulungen, jedoch sehr wichtig für das Verständnis und die Anwendung bei Administration, Konfiguration und weiteren Aktivitäten von SAP Experten.

 

Kurskürzel

Kursname

S4H00

SAP S/4HANA - Grundlagen

S4D400

SAP S/4HANA - Customizing für Finanzwesen

THR81

SAP SuccessFactors - Recruiting

SAP S/4HANA - Finanzbuchhaltung

SAP S/4HANA - Financial Accounting for SAP Fiori
